scripts.lint: node --check packages/scheme-engine/src/index.js && node --check packages/scheme-registry/src/index.js && node --check packages/scheme-registry/src/schema.js && node --check packages/types/src/index.js && node --check infra/scripts/repo-debug.mjs
scripts.typecheck: node -e "console.log('TypeScript typecheck gate will be activated when API/mobile/admin TS projects are wired.')"
scripts.build: node -e "console.log('Build pipeline placeholder for upcoming app/api packages.')"
scripts.qa: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run debug
